title: Mellurboo's Emoji Express
description: 😎 Spice up chat with an Extendable Drag and drop chat emojis plugin, preconfigured to be backwards compatible with Discord. or add your own!
body:
## 🫢 Emoji Express, Simple Extendable Emoji Engine!
Using a Simple Config File Add, Remove, Edit or Replace Emojis in Seconds

![Showing just some of the Emojis the plugin is capable of](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e4925776fffe2f28b4f577d01685ddef185c5b9.png)

## 💝 Why is this the best emojis plugin? 
1. **🚫No Permission Issues:** because they're very simple emojis theres no need for permissions.
2. **🖱️It's Drag and Drop:** the config file is preconfigured for you, you only need to change it if you want
3. **🎟️It's Discord Backwards Compatable:** by default your discord to minecraft chat plugin will work fine
4. **💩A noob can understand it:** theres no server magic here, it's unicode being used to make chat better.
5. **🪶Very Lightweight:** No slowdowns, we take pride in performance!

### 📜 How to use (It's simple, as always)
in the chat, players can type :emoji_name: and when the message is sent the server will replace that with the unicode emoji.

> for example "Hello everyone! :heart:" becomes -> "Hello Everyone ❤️" . It's that 
players can have their text and emojis in the same message!

### How to Edit (extend, remove, change or replace)
All Emojis and their names are stored in config.yml, as a result you can simply add to them without any issue or needing any code changes. 

for example:
`heart: §c❤️§r`, here we give it a name (heart), then a colour, in this case it is red, but using the minecraft colour codes you can change this to whatever, but we also include our emoji, this will print a red heart for us in the minecraft chat, but this can be applied to anything, even a yellow smiley face
`smiley: §e😃§r`

## Support
if you need any help shoot me a message on discord `@mellurboo` (not that you will need too 😉)
